conversation_starters.title: Smells of Greece fill Chapline Street as the 25th Annual Grecian Festival kicks off in Wheeling
conversation_starters.summary: Marquee local festival happening now, work-safe light opener. You could open with: 'Did you make it to the Grecian Festival on Chapline Street this week?'
conversation_starters.description: WHEELING, W.Va. (WTRF) - The sights, sounds and smells of Greece filled the air on Chapline Street outside of St. John the Divine Greek Orthodox Church Wednesday as they kicked off their 25th Annual Grecian Festival. The three-day event is running now until Friday, July 24. Each day it begins at 11 a.m. and ends at 9 [...]

you_should_know.title: State delegate who works as a teacher faces federal charges of seducing 15-year-old girl
you_should_know.summary: Sitting state delegate charged federally and removed by the Speaker; political-institutional event landing on the state. Unsafe opener; walk in aware. Not conversation starters (official/political).
you_should_know.description:
A state delegate who is also a school teacher is being accused in federal court of seducing a 15-year-old girl. Delegate Elliott Pritt, a Republican from Fayette County, was charged with enticement of a minor and made an initial appearance before U.S. Magistrate Judge Dwane Tinsley. The Speaker of the House of Delegates removed Pritt

The post State delegate who works as a teacher faces federal charges of seducing 15-year-old girl appeared first on WV MetroNews.

you_should_know.summary: Governor requesting federal funding for June flooding in Boone/Logan; relief/mitigation and forward-looking, so you-should-know not are-you-ok. Southern WV, somewhat distant from metro.
you_should_know.description:
Flooding devastated southern West Virginia June 22-23.
